# GEVINO Opto PNP

> GEVINO Opto PNP is an affordable, Arduino Zero compatible industrial PLC built around the Microchip SAMD21 (32-bit ARM Cortex-M0+, 48 MHz, 256 KB flash, 32 KB RAM). It provides 11 dual-polarity opto-isolated inputs, 4 short-circuit-protected PNP outputs (plus 2 optional NPN auxiliary outputs), 2 analog inputs (20 mA / 1 V / 10 V, 12-bit), an RS485 bus, an SD card slot, and optional Ethernet / Wi-Fi / Bluetooth / RTC / cellular-modem modules. It is designed and manufactured by GEVA Elettronica (Italy) and is programmed with the Arduino IDE using the Arduino SAMD core (board: Arduino Zero, Native USB Port).

This repository contains a single-header Arduino support library, ready-to-flash examples, the hardware manual (PDF), and a programming guide written specifically for LLMs and AI coding agents.

## Documentation
- [README](README.md): full product overview, technical specifications, complete pin map, installation and quick start.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): programming guide for LLMs and AI coding agents — non-blocking state-machine style, serial ports, RS485 + Modbus, Ethernet (W5500), SD (SdFat), flash-as-EEPROM (FlashStorage), the non-blocking ADC and Timer, and HTML web-UI conventions.

## Library
- [src/gevino_opto_pnp_io.h](src/gevino_opto_pnp_io.h): the single, self-contained library header — all pin/I-O macros, board setup, non-blocking ADC helpers and the Timer class. No external dependencies. When unsure of a name or pin, read this file.
- [keywords.txt](keywords.txt): Arduino IDE syntax highlighting.
- [library.properties](library.properties): Arduino library metadata.

## Examples
- [ADC](examples/ADC/ADC.ino): non-blocking analog reading with analogPolling().
- [Timer](examples/Timer/Timer.ino): non-blocking blink using the Timer class.
- [Aux_As_Output](examples/Aux_As_Output/Aux_As_Output.ino): using the analog pins as NPN auxiliary outputs 5/6.
- [GEVINO_opto_PNP_Test](examples/GEVINO_opto_PNP_Test/GEVINO_opto_PNP_Test.ino): full factory test (SD, RTC, FRAM, Ethernet, CAN, LoRa, ESP, SIM, inputs/outputs).

## Hardware documentation
- [docs/](docs/): hardware manual (PDF) and CE declaration.

## Optional
- Manufacturer: GEVA Elettronica — https://www.gevaelettronica.it (info@gevaelettronica.it)
- Repository: https://github.com/gioreva/GEVINO-Opto-PNP
